ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cars" (
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car model */,
  "car_name" TEXT /* Name of the car model */,
  "make_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the make of the car */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Year the car model was produced */,
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the engine specifications */,
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transmission type */,
  "fuel_system_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fuel system */,
  "drive_train_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the drive train */,
  "body_style_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the body style */,
  "car_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the car model */,
  "car_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the car (in kg) */,
  "emissions" INTEGER /* Emissions level (in g/km) */,
  "fuel_capacity" REAL /* Fuel tank capacity (in liters) */,
  "seating_capacity" INTEGER /* Number of seats in the car */,
  "safety_rating" INTEGER /* Safety rating (1-5 stars) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cars_transmission_id FOREIGN KEY ("transmission_id") REFERENCES transmissions ("transmission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cars_fuel_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("fuel_system_id") REFERENCES fuel_systems ("fuel_system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cars_drive_train_id FOREIGN KEY ("drive_train_id") REFERENCES drive_trains ("drive_train_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cars_make_id FOREIGN KEY ("make_id") REFERENCES makes ("make_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cars_body_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("body_style_id") REFERENCES body_styles ("body_style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cars_engine_id FOREIGN KEY ("engine_id") REFERENCES engines ("engine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "makes" (
  "make_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car manufacturer */,
  "make_name" TEXT /* Name of the car manufacturer */,
  "make_country" TEXT /* Country of the car manufacturer */,
  "make_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the car manufacturer */,
  "make_foundation_year" INTEGER /* Year the car manufacturer was founded */,
  "make_logo_path" TEXT /* File path to the manufacturer's logo */,
  "make_website" TEXT /* Official website URL of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("make_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engines" (
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engine specification */,
  "engine_code" TEXT /* Code name or identifier for the engine */,
  "num_cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders in the engine */,
  "displacement" REAL /* Engine displacement in cubic centimeters */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower output of the engine */,
  "torque" INTEGER /* Torque output of the engine */,
  "engine_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the engine */,
  "engine_fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel the engine uses (e.g., gasoline, diesel, electric) */,
  "engine_valves_per_cylinder" INTEGER /* Number of valves per cylinder */,
  "engine_fuel_delivery" TEXT /* Type of fuel delivery system (e.g., direct injection, port injection) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmissions" (
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmission type */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., manual, automatic) */,
  "num_gears" INTEGER /* Number of gears in the transmission */,
  "transmission_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the transmission */,
  "transmission_torque_converters" INTEGER /* Number of torque converters (for automatic transmissions) */,
  "transmission_clutch_type" TEXT /* Type of clutch (e.g., single, dual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transmission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_systems" (
  "fuel_system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel system type */,
  "fuel_system_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel system (e.g., carburetor, fuel injection) */,
  "fuel_system_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the fuel system */,
  "fuel_system_delivery" TEXT /* Type of fuel delivery (e.g., direct injection, port injection) */,
  "fuel_system_turbocharged" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the system is turbocharged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drive_trains" (
  "drive_train_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drive train configuration */,
  "drive_train_type" TEXT /* Type of drive train (e.g., front-wheel drive, rear-wheel drive) */,
  "drive_train_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the drive train */,
  "drive_train_differential_type" TEXT /* Type of differential (e.g., open, limited-slip) */,
  "drive_train_all_wheel_drive" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the car has all-wheel drive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drive_train_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "body_styles" (
  "body_style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each body style */,
  "body_style_type" TEXT /* Type of body style (e.g., sedan, coupe, wagon) */,
  "body_style_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the body style */,
  "body_style_doors" INTEGER /* Number of doors */,
  "body_style_trunk_capacity" REAL /* Trunk capacity (in liters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("body_style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car model */,
  "mpg_city" REAL /* Miles per gallon in city driving */,
  "mpg_highway" REAL /* Miles per gallon in highway driving */,
  "acceleration_0_60" REAL /* Time to accelerate from 0 to 60 mph */,
  "top_speed" REAL /* Top speed of the car */,
  "braking_distance" REAL /* Braking distance from 60 mph to 0 mph */,
  "mpg_combined" REAL /* Combined miles per gallon (city and highway) */,
  "acceleration_quarter_mile" REAL /* Time to accelerate from 0 to 1/4 mile (in seconds) */,
  "braking_distance_wet" REAL /* Braking distance from 60 mph to 0 mph on wet roads (in meters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of a car model */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car model */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number (e.g., 1.0, 2.0) */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the version changes */,
  "version_major" INTEGER /* Major version number */,
  "version_minor" INTEGER /* Minor version number */,
  "version_patch" INTEGER /* Patch version number */,
  "version_changes" TEXT /* Detailed list of changes in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_versions_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., R&D, marketing, sales, admin) */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., R&D, marketing, sales) */,
  "user_created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the car data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the car data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car model the image belongs to */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "image_size" REAL /* Size of the image in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "image_caption" TEXT /* Caption for the image */,
  "image_alt_text" TEXT /* Alternative text for the image (for accessibility) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_images_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car model the video belongs to */,
  "video_path" TEXT /* File path to the video */,
  "video_size" REAL /* Size of the video in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the video was uploaded */,
  "video_caption" TEXT /* Caption for the video */,
  "video_alt_text" TEXT /* Alternative text for the video (for accessibility) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_videos_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)
